content.text:
I'm ready to help you with the recommendations-service codebase. I can see you have several modified files in your working directory:

- `src/assets/trending-products.html`
- `src/constants/recommendations.constants.ts`
- `src/modules/db/forecasted-trending-products/models/forecasted-trending-products.model.ts`
- `src/modules/db/redshift/trending-items/dto/redshift-trending-items.dto.ts`
- `src/modules/db/redshift/trending-items/redshift-trending-items.service.ts`
- `src/modules/rest/promos/promos.service.ts`

I'm familiar with your stack (NestJS, Fastify, MySQL, TypeScript strict mode) and your development standards including:
- No comments in code
- Explicit return types
- Path aliases instead of relative imports
- Read/write database connection separation
- Branch naming convention (RECO-XXXX-suffix)

What would you like me to help you with today?
